home.eyebrow: Okinawa, Japan-based Software Developer | IoT & Robotics Enthusiast | DX Evangelist

hero.title: Building digital products and collecting stories across Japan.
hero.description: I’m a developer based in Okinawa, Japan. I share my development experiences and document my travels along the way. I hope this site will be helpful for other developers and travelers who are interested in Japan. Feel free to reach out if you want to connect or collaborate on projects!

focus.developerDescription: Projects, technical decisions, lessons learned, and practical software engineering notes.
focus.japanDescription: Professional growth, work culture, daily routines, and observations from living in Japan.
focus.travelDescription: Places, photos, memories, and small discoveries from Japan and beyond.

cta.title: Want to collaborate or talk about development in Japan?
cta.description: I’m open to developer opportunities, collaborations, and conversations about web development, Japan life, and travel.

experience.title: My developer journey in Japan.
experience.description: This section will showcase my professional background, technical skills, work experience, and lessons learned while building software in Japan.
experience.skillsDescription: Frontend development, backend systems, cloud deployment, performance, clean UI, and practical engineering.
experience.japanDescription: Work culture, communication, teamwork, problem solving, and adapting as a developer in Japan.

projects.title: Things I’ve built.
projects.description: A collection of selected projects, experiments, and case studies.

travel.title: Places, stories, and small discoveries.
travel.description: This section will become a travel journal for my experiences in Japan and beyond — with photos, notes, and recommendations.

contact.title: Let’s connect.
contact.description: I’m open to developer opportunities, collaborations, and conversations about web development, Japan, and travel.

footer.built: Built with Astro and deployed on AWS Amplify.

search.empty: Start typing to search your portfolio.

portfolio-website.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio-website.description: A fast personal portfolio built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, and AWS Amplify Hosting.
portfolio-website.body: This portfolio showcases my developer journey in Japan, selected projects, and travel stories. The goal is to keep the site fast, clean, and easy to update over time.

developer-tool.title: Developer Tool
developer-tool.description: A future case study for a tool, app, or system I have built.
developer-tool.body: This is a placeholder project entry. Later, I can replace this with a real project, including screenshots, technical decisions, challenges, and results.

tokyo-city-notes.title: Tokyo City Notes
tokyo-city-notes.description: City lights, cafés, daily routines, and small discoveries around Tokyo.
tokyo-city-notes.body: Tokyo has a way of mixing energy and calm in the same day. This post will become a travel story with photos, favorite places, and personal notes.

kyoto-autumn-walk.title: Kyoto Autumn Walk
kyoto-autumn-walk.description: Temples, quiet streets, autumn colors, and slower travel moments.
kyoto-autumn-walk.body: Kyoto is perfect for slower travel. This post can later include photos, route notes, food spots, and reflections.
